subject: [PATCH v3 14/28] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds routines for encoding and decoding CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces new functions to handle the encoding and decoding of these messages, which are generated by the xdrgen tool. The patch also includes changes to the state.h and xdr4cb.h files to support the new functionality. The goal is to improve the handling of CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFS server.
